faq.question: What is a Payment Gateway?
faq.answer: A payment gateway is an ecommerce service that processes online payments for online as well as offline businesses. Payment gateways help accept payments by transferring key information from their merchant websites to issuing banks, card associations and online wallet players. Payment gateways play a vital role in the online transaction process, which is the realisation of value, and hence are seen as an important pillar of ecommerce.

faq.question: Do I need to pay to Instapay even when there is no transaction going on in my business?
faq.answer: No, you are not required to pay if there is no transaction happening.

faq.question: What platforms does Instapay payment gateway support?
faq.answer: Instapay supports major platforms including Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, etc.

faq.question: Does Instapay provide international payments support?
faq.answer: Yes, Instapay supports international payment gateways.

faq.question: Is there any setup fee or annual maintenance fee that I need to pay regularly?
faq.answer: Instapay has no hidden setup or maintenance charges for basic usage.
